title: 2024-2025 Academic Year Orientation Days

2024-2025 Academic Year Orientation Days

2024-2025 Academic Year Orientation Days

The Faculty of Communication Orientation Days will be held on Tuesday, October 8th, from 09:00 to 10:00 at the Nermin Tarhan Conference Hall, located at the Main Campus.
